economic_notes: First Nation has partnered with five other First Nations to participate in electrical transmission projects connecting communities to the provincial grid. Investment in Argonaut Gold Inc. (publicly traded) with market value of $2,255,449. Boundary claim settlement trust exists where First Nation is beneficiary of all taxable income.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Two consolidated subsidiaries: First Nation of Michipicoten Cultural Association and Michipicoten First Nation Economic Development Corporation. The 'Rentals, interest and other' revenue line of $6,422,634 is unusually large compared to budget of $455,401 and prior year $4,783,787 - likely driven by trust/settlement distributions and investment gains. Health and social services are combined as one segment. No schedule of remuneration for Chief and Council was included in the financial statements provided. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($1,328,491) + Canada ($399,658) + Ontario ($418,349) = $2,146,498. osr = $11,885,159 - $2,146,498 = $9,738,661 (includes trust income, Aboriginal organizations, OFN LP, and other revenue).
